data.title: CLEAResult Canada named energy efficiency consulting partner of Toronto Blue Jays, new partnership announced.
data.description: In Toronto, CLEAResult Canada has recently partnered with the Toronto Blue Jays, known as "Canada's Team."

data.title: Walton Global launches $250M offering with target return of 11.5% for accredited investors in Builder Land Finance Fund III.
data.description: A real estate investment and land asset management company called Walton Global has introduced Builder Land Finance (BLF) Fund III in Scottsdale, Arizona. This private credit offering is created for accredited investors and aims to provide a fixed-income opportunity backed by land. The fund is focused on institutional land banking and offers flexible financing tailored to homebuilder requirements. BLF Fund III has a target annualized return of 9%-11.5%, distributed quarterly through a debt-based structure.

data.title: PPG's Board of Directors announced a dividend increase to 71 cents per share, up by 3 cents.
data.description: The Board of Directors of PPG in Pittsburgh has recently announced a quarterly dividend increase of 3 cents per share, bringing the total to 71 cents per share.

data.title: Luxury auction for oceanside home on Hawaii's Big Island set for July 31st, real-time bidding on property site.
data.description: A luxury auction is set to take place on July 31st, 2025, for an oceanside home located on Hawaii's Big Island. Bidders will have the opportunity to compete for the property in real-time at the location. The auction represents a unique chance for buyers interested in acquiring a high-end home in a scenic Hawaiian setting. Interested parties should mark their calendars and prepare to make their bids at the end of this month in Kailua-Kona.

data.title: ANSI rebrands World Standards Week as ANSI Innovation Summit, focusing on progress. News announced on July 17, 2025.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, in New York, the American National Standards Institute (ANSI) revealed that its yearly World Standards Week will now be known as the ANSI Innovation Summit: Where Standards Power Progress. This revamped conference aims to offer a fresh perspective on the standards industry and spark innovation. The event will host a series of activities, including keynote speeches, panel discussions, and networking opportunities. The move comes as part of ANSI's efforts to stay relevant and forward-thinking in the fast-paced world of standards development.
U.S. TARIFF RECEIPTS SOAR TO $87 BILLION, EMERGE AS STABLE REVENUE
Landsbankinn hf. reports strong performance with a net profit of $50 million in the first half of 2025.

data.title: Star Group, L.P. declares a quarterly distribution of 18.50 cents per unit for the three months ended June 30, 2025.
data.description: In Stamford, Connecticut on July 17, 2025, Star Group, L.P. announced a quarterly distribution for the period ending June 30, 2025. The company, listed as "Star" on the NYSE under the symbol SGU, disclosed a distribution of $0.1850 per common unit. Star Group, L.P. is recognized as a supplier and service provider in the home energy sector.

data.title: ETH rallies to $3,500 with big inflows. US House pushes crypto bills. Coinbase renames wallet to Base, integrates Farcaster. US may have sold 80% of BTC reserves. BofA & Citigroup set to launch stablecoin. Phantom surpasses Pumpfun in 24hr revenue. Bitcoin seen as solution to public debt. Talos acquires Coin Metrics for $100m. France eyes 5yr BTC mining pilot. Thai SEC, Central Bank launching crypto sandbox. WindTree to acquire $60m BNB. YHC spikes 150% on takeover bid. CME not launching memecoin derivatives. Smarter Web buys 325 BTC. Plasma starting XPL sale. Hyperliquid onboards 10k users. Bill allows crypto as mortgage collateral.
data.description: The price of ETH is approaching $3,500 following significant inflows into ETFs. Additionally, Sharplink's stock has reached $35 and successfully concluded its ATM program. In the US, the House has made progress on advancing crypto-related bills. Coinbase has rebranded its wallet to Base and has integrated Farcaster. There is uncertainty surrounding whether the US has sold 80% of its BTC reserves. A new bill has been introduced to permit crypto assets as collateral for mortgages. Bank of America and Citigroup are set to launch a stablecoin. Plasma is set to commence the XPL sale today. Phantom has surpassed Pumpfun in 24-hour revenue and has onboarded 10,000 users to Hyperliquid. CZ believes Bitcoin could potentially alleviate a significant portion of public debt. Talos has acquired the data firm Coin Metrics for $100 million. Smarter Web has acquired an additional 325 BTC. France is contemplating a 5-year pilot program for BTC mining. The Thai SEC and Central bank are collaborating to establish a crypto sandbox. WindTree is acquiring $60 million worth of BNB. CME has decided not to introduce derivatives tied to memecoins. YHC has experienced a 150% increase in value due to a hostile takeover attempt.

data.title: PodcastOne (NASDAQ: PODC) signs multiyear deal for Chrisley Confessions 2.0. Todd and Julie Chrisley rejoin daughter Savannah after Trump's pardon, launching first episodes in two years.
data.description: Following President Trump's pardon, Chrisley Confessions 2.0 returns with its first episodes in two years. The podcast reunites with Savannah Chrisley at PodcastOne.
U.S. TO CURTAIL PRACTICE OF DECLARING FOREIGN ELECTIONS FREE AND FAIR - REPORTS

data.title: Jacqueline Villamil named CEO & Sole Owner of SSP, a top provider in hospitality industry, on July 17, 2025.
data.description: In an exciting development, Jacqueline Villamil has taken on the position of CEO and now holds full ownership of Strategic Solution Partners (SSP), a renowned provider of task force and consulting services in the hospitality sector. The transition took place on July 17, 2025 in West Chester, Pennsylvania. This marks a significant change for SSP as Jacqueline Villamil now leads the company as the sole owner and CEO, signaling a new phase for the organization.

data.title: Shea Homes partners with Fairplay to offer affordable new homes, giving buyers control with exceptional prices.
data.description: A newly launched Offer Program by Shea Homes Active Lifestyle Communities in Scottsdale, Arizona, on July 17, 2025, aims to provide competitive prices and convenience for lifestyle buyers. This program allows buyers to have more control over their purchasing decisions, putting them back in the driver's seat. This initiative caters to the changing demands of modern buyers, ensuring a seamless and favorable buying experience.

data.title: Hilco Streambank looking for offers to acquire House of Design LLC's IP and assets in construction robotics automation.
data.description: Hilco Streambank, a prominent advisory firm focusing on valuing and monetizing intangible assets, has revealed its intention to secure bids for the purchase of the operational assets and intellectual property of House of Design Robotics. The announcement was made on July 17, 2025. Interested parties can find more information on the auction process at www.HilcoStreambank.com.

data.title: Broco Energy partners with Massport to supply renewable diesel, driving carbon reduction solutions; key facilities involved.
data.description: In a recent press release dated July 17, 2025, Broco Energy revealed a significant collaboration with the Massachusetts Port Authority (Massport) aimed at converting Massport's fuel tanks. Broco Energy, known for its expertise in clean energy solutions in the New England region, will be overseeing this initiative. This partnership signifies a major step towards sustainable energy practices in the area and underscores Massport's commitment to environmental responsibility. This move aligns with the growing trend towards eco-friendly energy sources, with the transition likely to have a positive impact on reducing carbon emissions.

data.title: MiningToken has launched a global clean energy cloud mining network with 9 farms on renewable sources. Offers BTC, XRP, and DOGE mining without hardware. Free rewards for new users. Plans from 1 day. Operating in 8 countries with different green energy sources.
data.description: MiningToken, a Swiss cloud mining platform, has introduced a global green-energy-powered cloud mining infrastructure operating across nine farms in various countries. These farms operate on 100% renewable energy sources such as hydropower, wind, geothermal, and solar energy. The platform enables users worldwide to mine Bitcoin, XRP, and Dogecoin without managing physical hardware. It offers intelligent hashrate scheduling, energy optimization, and risk-managed operations. MiningToken provides incentives like free cloud mining rewards for new users, flexible mining plans, AI-powered resource scheduling, and mobile mining support. Users can register, claim rewards, choose plans, and start mining using the platform. Full details available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: POET Technologies completes US$25M public offering with 5M units sold at $5 each, grossing $25M for AI tech development.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, POET Technologies Inc. (TSXV: PTK; NASDAQ: POET), a company specializing in optical engines for AI networks, announced the completion of a non-brokered public offering. They sold 5,000,000 units at US$5.00 per unit, generating US$25,000,000 in gross proceeds. Each unit includes one common share and one warrant exercisable at C$8.16 for a Common Share for five years.

data.title: 13th Annual Globee® Awards for Leadership open for global entries; recognizing achievements worldwide.
data.description: Acknowledging leadership in all areas: The 13th Annual Globee® Awards for Leadership is now accepting submissions from across the globe. The prestigious awards program, known for its data-driven approach, is based in San Francisco. Entries are open for professionals and organizations internationally to showcase their leadership achievements.

data.title: Pacaso expands Mexico offerings with co-ownership in Punta de Mita, Riviera Maya, and Mexico City. Luxury options for US buyers. (Characters: 122)
data.description: Expanding from its initial triumph in Los Cabos, Pacaso introduces additional fully furnished luxury second home choices to American buyers in various top-tier Mexican resort and city centers. On July 17, 2025, in San Francisco, Pacaso, known for its innovative platform facilitating shared ownership of upscale vacation properties, revealed their new offerings.
